title: 2022.5.20Migrating millions of lines of code to TypeScriptSummary:On Sunday, March 6, we migrated we converted more than 3.7 million lines of code with a single pull request. The next day, hundreds of engineers came in to start writing TypeScript for their projects.Author:Andrew LunnyTopics:TypeScriptJavaScriptDeveloper ProductivityOpen SourceEngineeringRead
